facilities.name: Bitters Bulky Waste Collection Center
facilities.hours: Tuesday-Friday: 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. Saturday: 8:00 AM-12:00 PM. Closed Sunday and Monday.
facilities.fees: Free for City of San Antonio Solid Waste Management customers who show the environmental fee on a recent CPS Energy bill and a matching photo ID.
accepted_materials: Up to six car tires without rims
not_accepted: Large dirt, rock, or concrete loads
facilities.rules: San Antonio limits bulky drop-off to solid waste fee-paying residential customers. Bring a recent CPS Energy bill with the environmental fee plus photo ID, keep debris within the truck bed, and cover your load before driving.

facilities.address: 1531 Frio City Rd, San Antonio, TX 78226

facilities.name: Culebra HHW Drop-Off Center
facilities.hours: Tuesday-Friday: 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. Saturday: 8:00 AM-12:00 PM. Closed Sunday and Monday. Appointments may be required for some loads.
facilities.fees: Free for City of San Antonio Solid Waste Management customers who show the environmental fee on a recent CPS Energy bill and a matching photo ID.
facilities.rules: San Antonio caps household hazardous waste drop-off at 220 pounds per visit and requires proof that you pay the city environmental fee through CPS Energy. Use the city HHW page before visiting because appointment rules and accepted-item limits can change.

facilities.name: Bitters Monthly HHW Drop-Off Event
facilities.hours: Monthly on the first Friday and following Saturday, 8:00 AM-12:00 PM, except holidays. Confirm the current calendar before visiting.
facilities.fees: Free for City of San Antonio Solid Waste Management customers who show the environmental fee on a recent CPS Energy bill and a matching photo ID.
accepted_materials: Electronics approved by the city HHW program
facilities.rules: This is a city-run monthly household hazardous waste event, not a daily drop-off center. Bring a recent CPS Energy bill showing the environmental fee, photo ID, and keep household hazardous waste under the city's posted 220-pound limit.

facilities.name: Rigsby Quarterly HHW Drop-Off Event
facilities.hours: Quarterly on select Saturdays, 8:00 AM-12:00 PM. Confirm the current city HHW event calendar before visiting.
facilities.fees: Free for City of San Antonio Solid Waste Management customers who show the environmental fee on a recent CPS Energy bill and a matching photo ID.
accepted_materials: Electronics approved by the city HHW program
facilities.rules: This is a periodic city HHW event rather than a daily service. Bring a recent CPS Energy bill showing the environmental fee, photo ID, and keep household hazardous waste under the city's posted 220-pound limit.

facilities.name: Bitters Brush Recycling Center
facilities.hours: Monday-Saturday: 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. Closed Sunday and city holidays.
facilities.fees: San Antonio charges brush drop-off in 20-pound increments for Solid Waste Management customers. Loads up to 20 pounds are $0.25; larger loads are priced by weight under the city's posted fee schedule.
facilities.rules: San Antonio brush drop-off is for city solid waste customers. Bring a recent CPS Energy bill with the environmental fee plus photo ID, and separate brush from trash before arrival.

facilities.name: Nelson Gardens Brush Recycling Center
facilities.hours: Monday-Sunday: 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. Friday and Saturday hours extend to 6:00 PM in June and July. Closed on city-observed holidays.
facilities.fees: San Antonio charges brush drop-off in 20-pound increments for Solid Waste Management customers. Use the city service guide or current operator notice to confirm exact rates before driving.
facilities.rules: Nelson Gardens is the city-linked west-side brush drop-off site. Bring a recent CPS Energy bill with the environmental fee plus photo ID and confirm any holiday schedule changes before driving.

facilities.name: Covel Gardens Recycling and Disposal Facility
facilities.hours: Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. Saturday: 8:00 AM-1:00 PM. Closed Sunday.
facilities.fees: WM charges by load, weight, and material type. Call ahead for current public rates and any special-waste paperwork.
facilities.rules: Covel Gardens is a paid WM landfill and disposal facility serving the San Antonio area. Confirm current public access, gate rates, and any material-specific restrictions before you drive.

facilities.name: Texas Disposal Systems Starcrest Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM-5:00 PM. Saturday: 8:00 AM-12:00 PM. Closed Sunday.
facilities.fees: Texas Disposal Systems posts gate rates for compactable trash, non-compactable debris, tires, appliances, and recycling. Confirm current pricing and any load fees before arrival.
not_accepted: Loads outside posted transfer station rules
facilities.rules: Texas Disposal Systems applies gate-rate categories by material type and charges additional fees for some unsecured loads. Use the operator's rate sheet before driving so you know whether your load belongs in the compactable, non-compactable, tire, or recycling line.

facilities.name: Republic Services Landfill Free Disposal Day
facilities.hours: Quarterly on select Saturdays, 8:00 AM-1:00 PM, during the city's Free Landfill Day program. Confirm the next event date before visiting.
facilities.fees: Free during San Antonio Free Landfill Day for eligible city solid waste customers. Normal landfill charges apply outside the city event.
facilities.rules: This is a city Free Landfill Day event, not a daily free dump. San Antonio requires a valid photo ID, a recent CPS Energy bill showing the environmental fee, and a covered load before arrival.
facilities.geocode_match: 7000 I- 10 ACCESS RD, SAN ANTONIO, TX, 78219
